title: European extreme heat wave — 48°C peak, 30-day duration
historical_analogue: 2003 European heat wave (35,000 deaths), 2022 heat wave (61,000 deaths)
description: Temperatures hit 48°C across France, Germany, and the UK. French nuclear plants cannot use warm river water for cooling and reduce output 30%. Manufacturing productivity collapses. Rail lines buckle. Harvest yields fall sharply.
